visuals.title: Pointer Memory Representation
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Pointer Memory Representation
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Pointer Concepts and Applications</text>
  
  <!-- Memory Address Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    0x7FFD34
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pointer Variable -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    int* ptr
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pointer Arrow -->
  <path d="M200,80 C170,80 170,80 140,80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Value Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    42
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dereferencing Pointer -->
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    *ptr = 42
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dereferencing Arrow -->
  <path d="M200,170 C170,170 170,170 140,170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Pointer Arithmetic -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ptr + 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Next Memory Address -->
  <rect x="200" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    0x7FFD38
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pointer Arithmetic Arrow -->
  <path d="M200,260 C170,260 170,260 140,260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="100" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Memory Address
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Pointer Variable
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Value
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Dereferencing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Pointer Arithmetic
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Next Address
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
